task_name: Penguin Species Research Report and Presentation
description: Analyze penguin morphological data to identify species-specific characteristics, produce a professional analysis report with publication-quality visualizations, and create academic conference slides.
prompt:
I am a zoologist, and I need to present my research findings on penguins next week. I have collected observational data on different penguin species, stored at the path artifacts/penguins.csv, which contains several hundred samples with measurements of bill length, bill depth, flipper length, body mass, species, island, and sex.

Based on these data, I would like to analyze the species-specific characteristics of different types of penguins. Please perform statistical analysis including: descriptive statistics per species, species comparison tests, and morphological differences between sexes within each species.

Generate at least 4 publication-quality figures (saved as PNG files) visualizing the key findings — for example, species comparison box plots, correlation scatter plots colored by species, and distribution plots.

I need you to produce two deliverables:
1. A professional and comprehensive analysis report on penguin species characteristics (report.docx), aimed at specialists, with embedded figures, statistical tables, and written interpretation of results.
2. Academic-style slides (presentation.pptx) with at least 10 slides covering: title, data overview, methodology, key findings with visualizations, species comparisons, and conclusions. The slides should tell a coherent data story suitable for a research conference.

evaluators.description: Check that at least 4 figure PNG files were generated
Check that report discusses all three penguin species
Check that the presentation has at least 10 slides
